name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
description: Experience the ultimate in luxury lip color with CHANEL's Velvet Matte Lipstick. This iconic formula delivers rich, long-lasting color with a sophisticated matte finish that feels comfortable all day.
details: Enriched with jojoba oil and vitamin E, it glides on smoothly and keeps lips hydrated while maintaining a velvety matte look.

name: Luminous Silk Foundation
description: Giorgio Armani's iconic Luminous Silk Foundation delivers a weightless, buildable coverage with a luminous, silk-like finish. Perfect for all skin types.
details: Award-winning formula with Micro-fil technology that ensures a flawless, natural-looking finish that lasts up to 18 hours.

name: Bronze Glow Palette
description: Create sun-kissed, radiant looks with this luxurious bronzing palette featuring four perfectly curated shades.
details: Ultra-fine, micronized powders blend effortlessly for a natural-looking warmth. Buildable formula for subtle to dramatic effects.

name: Dewy Setting Spray
description: Lock in your look with this hydrating setting spray that gives a dewy, fresh-faced finish all day long.
details: Infused with hyaluronic acid, aloe vera, and niacinamide. Vegan and cruelty-free formula.

name: Hydra Glow Serum
description: Reveal your skin's natural radiance with this intensive hydrating serum powered by La Mer's legendary Miracle Broth™.
details: Lightweight yet deeply nourishing, this serum delivers visible results from the first application. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Cream
description: Brighten and even out your skin tone with this powerful Vitamin C-infused moisturizing cream.
details: Clinically proven to reduce dark spots by 50% in 8 weeks. Dermatologist tested and suitable for sensitive skin.

name: Retinol Night Treatment
description: Transform your skin overnight with this advanced retinol treatment that reduces fine lines and improves skin texture.
details: Featuring encapsulated retinol for gradual release, minimizing irritation while maximizing results. Wake up to smoother, younger-looking skin.

name: Gentle Foam Cleanser
description: A gentle, soap-free foaming cleanser that removes dirt, oil, and makeup without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier.
details: pH-balanced formula suitable for sensitive and acne-prone skin. Dermatologist recommended for daily use.

name: Matte Revolution Lipstick
description: Charlotte Tilbury's bestselling Matte Revolution Lipstick delivers a full-coverage, cashmere-soft matte finish.
details: The magic formula includes a 3D glow pigment, orchid extract, and lipstick tree-derived oil for a smooth, blurred finish.

name: Soft Matte Concealer
description: Full coverage, creamy concealer that smooths, corrects, and perfects skin for a natural matte finish.
details: Multi-action formula with Vitamin E and botanical extracts. Crease-proof and transfer-resistant for up to 16 hours.

name: Rose Deep Hydration Moisturizer
description: A silky, gel-cream moisturizer infused with real rose petals and hyaluronic acid for 72 hours of deep hydration.
details: Clinically shown to boost skin hydration by 200%. Lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs instantly.

name: SPF 50 Invisible Sunscreen
description: Ultra-light, invisible finish sunscreen with broad spectrum SPF 50 protection. No white cast, suitable for all skin tones.
details: Water-resistant up to 80 minutes. Contains La Roche-Posay Thermal Spring Water for antioxidant protection.

name: #FauxFilter Luminous Matte Foundation
description: A cult-favorite, fragrance-free foundation with full coverage, up to 24 hours of weightless wear, and a luminous matte finish.
details: Waterproof, super long wear (24hr), transfer-proof, fade-proof, sweat-proof, humidity-proof.

name: Easy Bake Loose Baking & Setting Powder
description: An easy-to-use loose powder perfectly curated for all skin tones to create an airbrushed, long-lasting complexion while blurring the appearance of pores and fine lines.
details: Ultra-refined powder that holds makeup in place all day without flashback. Controls shine and keeps skin looking flawless.

name: Empowered Eyeshadow Palette
description: An everyday eyeshadow palette that features 18 highly pigmented shades in matte, metallic, and versatile gel-eyeliner hybrid finishes.
details: Buttery soft textures, easy to blend. Cruelty-free and perfectly curated to empower your everyday makeup routine.

name: Liquid Matte Ultra-Comfort Transfer-Proof Lipstick
description: A long-wearing, transfer-proof liquid lipstick with a matte finish that provides ultra-comfort and a lightweight feel.
details: Infused with an exclusive complex to help maintain the lips' hydration, the lightweight formula glides on effortlessly.

name: Legit Lashes Double-Ended Volumizing Mascara
description: A long-lasting, intensely black, dual-ended mascara that delivers major volume, dramatic curl, and insane length without weighing down your lashes.
details: Two brushes, two formulas, one legit mascara. Use both sides for maximum drama or individually for a custom look.

name: Rose Quartz Eyeshadow Palette
description: A versatile palette packed with 18 rosy tints and earthy shades in ultra-wearable, highly pigmented textures.
details: Features matte, metallic, and pearlescent finishes to create endless romantic looks. Inspired by the crystal of universal love.

name: Epic Ink Vegan Waterproof Liquid Eyeliner
description: Featuring a slender and supple felt brush tip, this intensely pigmented, waterproof pen lets you achieve black liquid lines effortlessly.
details: Vegan formula, waterproof, smudge-proof, and highly pigmented.

name: Soft Matte Lip Cream
description: Neither lipstick nor lip gloss, this highly pigmented formula features a delectable fragrance and delivers a smooth coat of creamy matte color.
details: Lightweight, surprisingly durable, and sweet-scented formula.

name: Bare With Me Concealer Serum
description: Skincare meets makeup in this hydrating concealer serum infused with tremella mushroom, cica, and green tea.
details: Provides up to 24 hours of hydration and medium coverage to conceal dark circles and blemishes.

name: Marshmellow Smoothing Primer
description: This 10-in-1 superprimer is infused with smoothing marshmallow root extract for a soft, flawless canvas.
details: Smooths, softens, extends makeup wear for 16h, hydrates, soothes, evens tone, minimizes texture, blurs lines, adds a soft focus finish.

name: Ultimate Shadow Palette
description: A pro-level palette packed with 16 high-performance eyeshadows in a rainbow of tone-inspired shades.
details: Features a mix of velvety-rich textures and mesmerizing finishes that range from mattes and satins to shimmers and metallics.

name: Butter Gloss Non-Sticky Lip Gloss
description: Buttery soft and silky smooth, our decadent Butter Gloss is available in a wide variety of sumptuous shades.
details: Delivers sheer to medium coverage that melts onto your lips and is never sticky.
